esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cpu_user IS NOT NULL
    AND node_cpu_system IS NOT NULL
    AND node_cpu_idle IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    avg_user = AVG(node_cpu_user),
    avg_system = AVG(node_cpu_system),
    avg_idle = AVG(node_cpu_idle)
  BY node, cluster
| EVAL total = avg_user + avg_system + avg_idle
| EVAL cpu_util_pct = ROUND((avg_user + avg_system) / total * 100, 2)
// Alert when CPU utilization exceeds 85%
// CPU is computed as (user + system) / (user + system + idle)
// Sustained high CPU may indicate the node needs scaling or workload rebalancing
// Adjust threshold based on your capacity planning targets
| WHERE total > 0 AND cpu_util_pct > 85
| SORT cpu_util_pct DESC
